query:
-- ============================================================
-- BACK2HEALTH INVOICE ANALYSIS (Invoice #890144, $294.30 ex-GST)
-- Line items:
--   DID Australia (1) x2 = $4.00 ($2.00 each)
--   DID Australia (10) x1 = $20.00
--   Opticomm 100/40 (Unit 1, 304 Montague Rd) x1 = $150.00
--   Huntgroup with Time of Day Routing x2 = $0.00
--   MC - SmileTel Premium User License x1 = $15.00 (WAIT: pricebook says $28 sell - this is $15 actual)
--   Managed Voice Support x1 = $75.00
--   Voicemail x2 = $0.00
--   Premium-1 (call pack) x1 = $0.00
--   Variable: Telephone Usage = $30.30
-- ============================================================

-- ISSUE 1: S0460 has customerName = 'Healthy Dynamics' but belongs to C0029 (Back2Health)
-- The address matches: Unit 1, 304 MONTAGUE ROAD, WEST END QLD
-- Fix the customerName on S0460
UPDATE services SET
  customerName = 'Back2Health',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0460';

-- ISSUE 2: All 4 billing items are incorrectly linked to S0460 (the internet service)
-- They should be distributed to the correct SasBoss services
-- BI00438 = Voice - Telephone Usage $44.96 → variable charges, link to a voice service
-- BI00439 = Voice - Services $90.00 → MC - SmileTel Premium User License + Managed Voice Support
-- BI00440 = Voice - Direct In Dial Numbers $24.00 → DID services
-- BI00441 = Data - Internet $150.00 → S0460 (correct, keep)
-- BI00828 = Credit -$190.00 → keep on S0460 (credit for internet)

-- Fix BI00440 (DIDs $24.00) → link to SSFS3XRQ (DID Australia 10) as the primary DID service
UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'SSFS3XRQ',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00440';

-- Update SSFS3XRQ (DID Australia 10) with correct revenue
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyRevenue = '24.00',
  marginPercent = ROUND((24.00 - 2.00) / 24.00 * 100, 2),
  billingItemId = 'BI00440',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSFS3XRQ';

-- Update SS3EBJ4J (DID Australia 1 x2) - 2 DIDs at $2 each = $4 total, included in BI00440
-- Revenue is captured in BI00440 already (combined $24 for all DIDs)
-- Set cost correctly: 2 x $0.20 = $0.40
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.40',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SS3EBJ4J';

-- Fix BI00439 (Voice - Services $90.00) → link to SSWPBYU9 (MC - SmileTel Premium User License)
-- Invoice: MC Premium $15 + Managed Voice Support $75 = $90 total
-- SSWPBYU9 is the best match for the combined voice services billing item
UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'SSWPBYU9',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00439';

-- Update SSWPBYU9 (MC - SmileTel Premium User License) with combined voice revenue
-- Revenue = $90 (Premium $15 + Managed Voice Support $75)
-- Cost = $19.34 (1 x MC Premium wholesale)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyRevenue = '90.00',
  marginPercent = ROUND((90.00 - 19.34) / 90.00 * 100, 2),
  billingItemId = 'BI00439',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSWPBYU9';

-- Fix BI00438 (Voice - Telephone Usage $44.96) → link to SSWPBYU9 as secondary
-- Actually, variable charges should be a separate billing item on the voice service
-- Since we can't split BI00439, link BI00438 to the same voice service
UPDATE billing_items SET
  serviceExternalId = 'SSWPBYU9',
  matchStatus = 'service-matched',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'BI00438';

-- Fix S0460 (Opticomm/ABB internet): remove incorrectly assigned billing items
-- Only BI00441 ($150 internet) and BI00828 (-$190 credit) should remain on S0460
-- Revenue on S0460 = $150 + (-$190) = -$40 (net credit this month)
-- But for ongoing monthly revenue, use $150 (the credit is a one-off)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '150.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  billingItemId = 'BI00441',
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'S0460';

-- ISSUE 3: Voicemail x2 = $0.00 (confirmed bundled, no cost)
-- SSOIUI3N already has monthlyCost=3.00 - fix to $0
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Voicemail is $0 per invoice evidence (Back2Health 890144)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSOIUI3N';

-- ISSUE 4: Premium-1 (call pack) = $0.00 (bundled)
-- SSBH8SLW has monthlyCost=9.00 - fix to $0
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Premium-1 call pack is $0 bundled per invoice evidence (Back2Health 890144)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'SSBH8SLW';

-- PLATFORM-WIDE LEARNING: Voicemail is always $0 (bundled)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Voicemail is $0 bundled per invoice evidence (Back2Health 890144)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Voicemail%'
  AND monthlyCost != '0.00'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss';

-- PLATFORM-WIDE LEARNING: Premium-1, Premium-2, Premium-3 call packs are $0 (bundled)
UPDATE services SET
  monthlyCost = '0.00',
  monthlyRevenue = '0.00',
  marginPercent = NULL,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[AUTO-FIX] Premium call pack is $0 bundled per invoice evidence (Back2Health 890144)'),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName IN ('Premium-1', 'Premium-2', 'Premium-3')
  AND monthlyCost != '0.00'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss';

-- Also fix product cost map for Voicemail and Premium call packs
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map SET
  wholesaleCost = 0.00,
  defaultRetailPrice = 0.00,
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE productName IN ('Voicemail', 'Premium-1', 'Premium-2', 'Premium-3', 'Resi Voicemail');

-- LEARNING: MC - SmileTel Premium User License actual retail = $15 (not $28 from pricebook)
-- This customer is on a special/legacy rate. Don't change platform-wide, note it.
-- The $75 Managed Voice Support is a significant add-on - add to cost map if missing
INSERT INTO supplier_product_cost_map (supplier, productName, productCategory, wholesaleCost, defaultRetailPrice, notes, source)
SELECT 'Access4', 'Managed Voice Support', 'Voice - Services', 0.00, 75.00,
  'Managed Voice Support - retail $75/month per invoice Back2Health 890144. Wholesale cost TBC.',
  'Invoice Evidence'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM supplier_product_cost_map WHERE productName = 'Managed Voice Support'
);

-- Recalculate Back2Health customer totals
UPDATE customers SET
  monthlyCost = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyCost), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0029' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  monthlyRevenue = (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monthlyRevenue), 0)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0029' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  serviceCount = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM services
    WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0029' AND status != 'terminated'
  ),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE externalId = 'C0029';

-- Verify result
SELECT externalId, name, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost,
  ROUND((CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(monthlyCost AS DECIMAL(10,2))) / NULLIF(CAST(monthlyRevenue AS DECIMAL(10,2)),0) * 100, 2) AS marginPercent,
  serviceCount
FROM customers WHERE externalId = 'C0029';
